exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your public speaking forward
items: Identify and write down 3 specific speaking fears or concerns you have about public speaking
Research and watch 3 TED talks or presentations in your field or topic of interest
Define your core speaking topic and identify 3 key messages you want to convey
Record yourself speaking for 2 minutes on any topic to establish your baseline speaking habits
Create a written outline of your first 5-minute presentation including introduction, main points, and conclusion
Research and identify 3 potential speaking venues or opportunities in your local area
